title: Better Warps
description: /warp but better , with permission and customizable messages !
body:
### Better Warps
**Better Warps is a lightweight Minecraft plugin for Spigot that enhances the teleportation experience with a simple and intuitive warp system. With this plugin, players can create and use custom warps easily.**

### Features:
Create Warps: Use the /setwarp <name> command to create a warp point at your current location and direction. Requires the bw.create permission.
Teleport to Warps: Use the /warp <name> command to teleport to a previously set warp location. No permissions are needed for this command.
Customizable Messages: Configure messages in the config.yml file, with support for color codes. Default messages are in English.

# Permissions:

`bw.create` — permission to create warps using the `/setwarp <name>` command. It is set to operators (OP) by default.

`bw.delete` — permission to delete warps using the `/delwarp <name>` command. It is also set to operators (OP) by default.

`bw.use`  — permission to teleport to warps using the `/warp <name>` command. It is also set to operators (OP) by default.

- (In Version 3.0 or higher you can add permission to specific warp (but player needs bw.use too)(if permission label in warps.yml does not appear, add permision: ```yourpermision.name``` below pitch:)
